sc.political.s: FEC: $159K to Democrats, $147K to Republicans 2020-2024 cycle (48% vs 46% split).
sc.dei.s: 2024 DEI Report: $10M+ program budget; HRC CEI 100; named inclusion initiatives with public staffing targets.
sc.labor.s: No NLRB unfair labor findings or OSHA fatalities on public record.
sc.charity.s: Palo Alto Networks Foundation: $50M+ cumulative giving; 2023 donations ~1.2% of pre-tax income.
sc.guns.s: No firearms manufacture or retail; cybersecurity software company.
sc.privacy.s: No documented HIPAA/FTC enforcement actions; privacy policy available but no major breaches on public record.
sc.execPay.s: Public filings show CEO-to-median ratio ~180:1 (2023); exceeds threshold but insufficient independent verification for rating.

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy
